prompt: Show total revenue by product brand for 2023 as a bar chart
answer: In 2023, the total revenue by product brand is as follows: GoldenCrust generated $1,237,536.46, CreamyFarm $1,116,963.60, CleanHome $985,063.32, CoolSip $942,234.79, GlowUp $682,053.43, and CrunchTime $452,267.33. The total revenue across all brands amounts to $5,416,118.93.

x_data = data_df[config['x_axis']]
y_data = data_df[config['y_axis']]

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(x_data, y_data)
plt.xlabel(config['x_axis'])
plt.ylabel(config['y_axis'])
plt.title(config['title'])

if len(x_data) > 10 or any(len(str(label)) > 10 for label in x_data):
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)
else:
    plt.xticks(rotation=0)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
visualization_goal: Bar chart showing total revenue per brand for 2023, ordered from highest to lowest
sql_query:
SELECT p.brand, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Revenue 
FROM sales s 
JOIN products p ON s.SKU_Coded = p.SKU_Coded 
WHERE CAST(s.Sold_Date AS VARCHAR) LIKE '2023%' 
GROUP BY p.brand 
ORDER BY Total_Revenue DESC;
